wrapper-2col: py-22 px-[var(--konde-gutter)] border-b border-[var(--konde-border)] grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-end
h1-green: text-[var(--konde-fs-h1)] font-bold leading-[1.04] tracking-[-0.025em] text-[var(--konde-green)] m-0
sub: block font-normal text-[clamp(20px,2.2vw,28px)] tracking-[-0.01em] text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] mt-[18px]
